description: An introduction to processes for manufacturing metal parts, designing parts to make them easier to manufacture with these methods, and approaches for increasing productivity. Manufacturing automation, control, and metrology for increased safety, productivity, and part quality. Engineering economics for determining the cost of manufacturing a part.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M S & E 350,351, or352or declared in Biological Systems Engineering: Machinery Systems BS),M E 231, and (M E 306orE M A 303)
